name: Kona Coffee Purveyors
tagline: 100% Kona paired with SF's b.Patisserie pastries — the best coffee in Waikiki, full stop.
parking: Validated parking at International Market Place garage (3 hrs free with purchase)
talkStory: Founded by Brandon Damitz, who personally visits every Big Island farm he sources from and knows the elevation, varietal, and processing method of every bean. He partnered with Belinda Leong of b.Patisserie — a James Beard-nominated SF bakery — so the kouign-amann here is world-class. The upstairs International Market Place location means most tourists walk right past. Go before 9am and ask which estate the current pour-over is from.
